Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under C-suite visibility, including serving as technical lead on a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, communicating risk and outcomes directly to executive stakeholders.

Shaped platform roadmap by translating field discoveries from enterprise customer deployments into core R&D priorities, ensuring **forward-deployed learnings** directly influenced what Azure shipped next across its resilience product surface.

Cut **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and search profiles to drive measurable pipeline impact with limited resources.
